## Pull Request Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the changes introduced in this PR and why they are necessary.

## Related Issues
Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring (structural code cleanups with zero functionality changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project (see `docs/coding_guidelines.md`).
- [ ] I have updated all corresponding documentation (e.g. `docs/public_api.md`, `docs/architecture.md`, `docs/roadmap.md`).
- [ ] I have added unit tests covering my changes.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass successfully.
- [ ] I have verified `dart analyze` reports zero warnings.
- [ ] I have verified `dart doc` compiles successfully.
- [ ] I have added/modified entries in `docs/development_log.md` and `CHANGELOG.md` detailing my implementation.
- [ ] This PR does not introduce performance regressions or circular dependencies.
